title: Drone on Ice
body: A drone is directed across a frictionless ice-covered lake. The mass of the drone is $$1.50$$ kg, and its velocity is $$3.00\hat{i}$$ $$\frac{m}{s}$$. After $$10.0$$ s, the velocity is $$9.00\hat{i}+4.00\hat{j}$$ $$\frac{m}{s}$$. A constant horizontal force causes this change in motion.
